description: Synthetic public cases for release-time companion surfacing contract coverage.

cases.description: Two public tool listings have similar summaries and capabilities.
cases.expectedDisposition: selection output must include a concise public reason and stable tie handling

cases.description: A semantically relevant candidate declares open-world or credentialed behavior.
cases.expectedDisposition: public companion output must show declared risk without claiming platform clearance

cases.description: A public resource has older review metadata than fresher alternatives.
cases.expectedDisposition: selection output must preserve stale or unavailable state instead of hiding it

cases.description: A public resource is valid but does not match the current task intent.
cases.expectedDisposition: selection output must prefer relevant public candidates and keep unrelated context out

cases.description: A candidate output does not match its declared public output contract.
cases.expectedDisposition: local validation must fail closed or return a bounded public error shape

cases.description: A candidate context bundle exceeds public item, token, or byte limits.
cases.expectedDisposition: public bundle output must stay bounded and use explicit deeper fetch links
